features: 4 X Mix Bundle New Scents Sovereign Car Home Office Gym Turbojet Air Sanitiser Freshener Spray
4 x Mix Bundle New Scents Sovereign Car Home Office Gym Turbojet Air Sanitiser Freshener Spray
description: The Sovereign Premium Turbo Jet Air Disinfectant Is A Powerful, High Perfume Product Designed To Instantly Eliminate Odors With Lasting Fragrance. The Air Disinfectant Is Specifically Designed To Deliver High Space Requirements In Large And Small Enclosed Spaces. Cars, Caravans, Offices, Conference Rooms, Marquees, Toilets, Machine Rooms And Any Other Enclosed Space, Be It A Home Or Workplace. The Air Sanitizer Unique Design Achieves This With Its Turbo Valve And Actuator That Delivers High Levels Of Perfume Instantly. The Layout Of The Product Has Changed, With 5 Unique Logos At The Bottom Of Each Can, Making Them More Attractive.
